patch.value: Add narrow MCP tools pm_notes, pm_learnings, pm_deps (agent self-documentation + deps)

notes/learnings/deps require pm_run with an action string, losing the ergonomic named-tool discoverability that pm_comments/pm_files/pm_docs have; notes/learnings are the primary agent self-documentation primitives.
pm_notes/pm_learnings/pm_deps added to TOOLS+HANDLERS with top-level id; instructions+docs+plugin tool counts updated; tests added.

notes/learnings/deps require pm_run with an action string, losing the ergonomic named-tool discoverability that pm_comments/pm_files/pm_docs have; notes/learnings are the primary agent self-documentation primitives.
